N:=47;
X:=x^9*(x - 1)^6*y^29
        - x^8*(x - 1)^5*(15*x^3 - 10*x^2 + x - 9)*y^28
        + x^7*(x - 1)^4*(105*x^6 - 135*x^5 + 40*x^4 - 95*x^3 + 37*x^2 + 15*x + 36)*y^27
        - x^6*(x - 1)^3*(455*x^9 - 840*x^8 + 380*x^7 - 410*x^6 + 265*x^5 + 185*x^4 + 212*x^3 - 28*x^2 - 136*x - 84)*y^26
        + x^5*(x - 1)^3*(1365*x^11 - 1820*x^10 - 70*x^9 - 630*x^8 - 525*x^7 + 1180*x^6 + 830*x^5 + 1270*x^4 - 267*x^3 - 647*x^2 - 589*x - 126)*y^25
        - x^4*(x - 1)^3*(3003*x^13 - 2184*x^12 - 2800*x^11 - 497*x^10 - 4422*x^9 + 2822*x^8 + 1642*x^7 + 6561*x^6 + 3299*x^5 - 350*x^4 - 3441*x^3 - 2779*x^2 - 1134*x - 126)*y^24
        + x^3*(x - 1)^3*(5005*x^15 - 8582*x^13 - 1036*x^12 - 13391*x^11 + 1456*x^10 + 2014*x^9 + 14890*x^8 + 20474*x^7 + 11050*x^6 - 3198*x^5 - 13499*x^4 - 11739*x^3 - 5712*x^2 - 1302*x - 84)*y^23
        - x^2*(x - 1)^3*(6435*x^17 + 5720*x^16 - 14420*x^15 - 5055*x^14 - 26508*x^13 - 12270*x^12 + 2305*x^11 + 15935*x^10 + 58140*x^9 + 53489*x^8 + 30081*x^7 - 20045*x^6 - 45451*x^5 - 41975*x^4 - 22104*x^3 - 6924*x^2 - 948*x - 36)*y^22
        + x*(x - 1)^2*(6435*x^20 + 6435*x^19 - 27215*x^18 + 820*x^17 - 25280*x^16 - 9275*x^15 + 47631*x^14 - 853*x^13 + 103963*x^12 + 35677*x^11 + 1507*x^10 - 96889*x^9 - 119101*x^8 - 63010*x^7 + 13966*x^6 + 54329*x^5 + 44967*x^4 + 20592*x^3 + 4824*x^2 + 423*x + 9)*y^21
        - (x - 1)*(5005*x^23 + 7150*x^22 - 35045*x^21 + 7110*x^20 - 6290*x^19 - 34155*x^18 + 134575*x^17 - 89850*x^16 + 161809*x^15 - 15259*x^14 - 61810*x^13 - 132989*x^12 - 197385*x^11 + 8261*x^10 + 119335*x^9 + 178748*x^8 + 80924*x^7 - 16698*x^6 - 56788*x^5 - 39775*x^4 - 14502*x^3 - 2249*x^2 - 111*x - 1)*y^20
        + (3003*x^25 + 7007*x^24 - 32748*x^23 + 4551*x^22 + 30241*x^21 - 95432*x^20 + 244620*x^19 - 214464*x^18 + 177845*x^17 + 29213*x^16 - 275592*x^15 + 83665*x^14 - 398337*x^13 + 254412*x^12 + 180209*x^11 + 299736*x^10 + 23098*x^9 - 167884*x^8 - 189168*x^7 - 77098*x^6 + 27553*x^5 + 49629*x^4 + 28198*x^3 + 7104*x^2 + 625*x + 13)*y^19
        - (1365*x^26 + 6825*x^25 - 15197*x^24 - 21753*x^23 + 43782*x^22 - 107899*x^21 + 187193*x^20 - 41388*x^19 - 39982*x^18 + 342108*x^17 - 495702*x^16 + 249602*x^15 - 608878*x^14 - 1338*x^13 + 214789*x^12 + 399574*x^11 + 440928*x^10 - 38646*x^9 - 267386*x^8 - 320934*x^7 - 123825*x^6 + 39344*x^5 + 85425*x^4 + 52842*x^3 + 16858*x^2 + 2196*x + 78)*y^18
        + (455*x^27 + 4095*x^26 - 2275*x^25 - 24115*x^24 + 27853*x^23 - 66258*x^22 + 49978*x^21 + 133327*x^20 - 187474*x^19 + 471145*x^18 - 405295*x^17 + 133673*x^16 - 355624*x^15 - 588106*x^14 + 274656*x^13 + 80588*x^12 + 895399*x^11 + 338738*x^10 + 3799*x^9 - 460330*x^8 - 440845*x^7 - 185122*x^6 + 54730*x^5 + 126620*x^4 + 83829*x^3 + 30745*x^2 + 5357*x + 286)*y^17
        - (105*x^28 + 1645*x^27 + 2135*x^26 - 13230*x^25 + 6965*x^24 - 17065*x^23 - 44089*x^22 + 158377*x^21 - 144637*x^20 + 301502*x^19 - 24179*x^18 - 172739*x^17 + 143916*x^16 - 1015364*x^15 + 175235*x^14 - 325451*x^13 + 767320*x^12 + 822227*x^11 + 452895*x^10 - 65371*x^9 - 621532*x^8 - 544613*x^7 - 242189*x^6 + 66666*x^5 + 161650*x^4 + 113379*x^3 + 45100*x^2 + 9658*x + 715)*y^16
        + (15*x^29 + 435*x^28 + 1745*x^27 - 3725*x^26 - 2595*x^25 + 5895*x^24 - 51315*x^23 + 73275*x^22 - 20616*x^21 + 46362*x^20 + 255060*x^19 - 275949*x^18 + 344654*x^17 - 775581*x^16 - 236740*x^15 - 308809*x^14 - 67803*x^13 + 1073531*x^12 + 605740*x^11 + 719583*x^10 - 294596*x^9 - 613315*x^8 - 647904*x^7 - 265123*x^6 + 58426*x^5 + 176430*x^4 + 129876*x^3 + 54516*x^2 + 13365*x + 1287)*y^15
        - (x^30 + 69*x^29 + 631*x^28 - 92*x^27 - 2747*x^26 + 6591*x^25 - 21112*x^24 + 1518*x^23 + 42040*x^22 - 66891*x^21 + 224411*x^20 - 106825*x^19 + 158906*x^18 - 152482*x^17 - 565347*x^16 - 55261*x^15 - 746767*x^14 + 685973*x^13 + 475674*x^12 + 991447*x^11 + 504797*x^10 - 244566*x^9 - 589504*x^8 - 655527*x^7 - 275891*x^6 + 27072*x^5 + 157030*x^4 + 124356*x^3 + 54632*x^2 + 14520*x + 1716)*y^14
        + (5*x^30 + 121*x^29 + 303*x^28 - 884*x^27 + 2183*x^26 - 1736*x^25 - 14716*x^24 + 33192*x^23 - 46676*x^22 + 67534*x^21 + 58216*x^20 - 47988*x^19 + 189400*x^18 - 431761*x^17 - 16157*x^16 - 613607*x^15 - 95626*x^14 + 330459*x^13 + 434255*x^12 + 1051733*x^11 + 235545*x^10 + 14853*x^9 - 588877*x^8 - 522824*x^7 - 302581*x^6 - 18048*x^5 + 101304*x^4 + 96090*x^3 + 44934*x^2 + 12506*x + 1716)*y^13
        - (10*x^30 + 95*x^29 - 72*x^28 + 210*x^27 + 1775*x^26 - 6813*x^25 + 10524*x^24 - 7628*x^23 - 14133*x^22 + 77719*x^21 - 78052*x^20 + 137532*x^19 - 96688*x^18 - 127246*x^17 - 141093*x^16 - 472612*x^15 + 133723*x^14 - 116160*x^13 + 730043*x^12 + 517480*x^11 + 413007*x^10 + 35787*x^9 - 403159*x^8 - 389169*x^7 - 301742*x^6 - 75504*x^5 + 29484*x^4 + 53235*x^3 + 29270*x^2 + 8502*x + 1287)*y^12
        + (10*x^30 + 25*x^29 - 40*x^28 + 672*x^27 - 1057*x^26 + 1012*x^25 + 3982*x^24 - 16848*x^23 + 33671*x^22 - 27409*x^21 + 11913*x^20 + 63895*x^19 - 138268*x^18 + 53980*x^17 - 284042*x^16 - 88351*x^15 - 148653*x^14 + 60260*x^13 + 450098*x^12 + 291541*x^11 + 492635*x^10 - 18285*x^9 - 124150*x^8 - 314469*x^7 - 244370*x^6 - 132040*x^5 - 29802*x^4 + 10146*x^3 + 13214*x^2 + 4433*x + 715)*y^11
        - (5*x^30 - 5*x^29 + 75*x^28 + 70*x^27 - 217*x^26 + 2114*x^25 - 4608*x^24 + 6172*x^23 + 1458*x^22 - 23106*x^21 + 52667*x^20 - 63447*x^19 + 14081*x^18 - 31482*x^17 - 152385*x^16 - 22335*x^15 - 178740*x^14 + 146992*x^13 + 98123*x^12 + 334575*x^11 + 265727*x^10 + 91864*x^9 - 10436*x^8 - 210376*x^7 - 179417*x^6 - 151080*x^5 - 62509*x^4 - 18882*x^3 + 878*x^2 + 1560*x + 286)*y^10
        + (x^30 - x^29 + 30*x^28 - 35*x^27 + 315*x^26 - 252*x^25 - 70*x^24 + 3698*x^23 - 10944*x^22 + 14734*x^21 - 9566*x^20 - 23859*x^19 + 36132*x^18 - 85128*x^17 - 3210*x^16 - 73970*x^15 - 54296*x^14 + 35763*x^13 + 43029*x^12 + 219404*x^11 + 113622*x^10 + 161497*x^9 - 14372*x^8 - 85440*x^7 - 134868*x^6 - 120817*x^5 - 69393*x^4 - 28392*x^3 - 6068*x^2 + 78)*y^9
        - (5*x^28 + 70*x^26 - 140*x^25 + 854*x^24 - 1526*x^23 + 736*x^22 + 3544*x^21 - 16077*x^20 + 17075*x^19 - 21176*x^18 - 19786*x^17 + 6943*x^16 - 62114*x^15 + 5568*x^14 - 21674*x^13 + 46553*x^12 + 71098*x^11 + 87424*x^10 + 97213*x^9 + 1069*x^8 - 21047*x^7 - 88096*x^6 - 73262*x^5 - 56092*x^4 - 24195*x^3 - 7856*x^2 - 706*x + 13)*y^8
        + (10*x^26 + 10*x^25 + 90*x^24 - 376*x^23 + 1480*x^22 - 3285*x^21 + 1525*x^20 + 1047*x^19 - 15290*x^18 + 11199*x^17 - 20598*x^16 - 10983*x^15 + 672*x^14 - 16848*x^13 + 22636*x^12 + 17356*x^11 + 53870*x^10 + 30839*x^9 + 19940*x^8 - 10150*x^7 - 39468*x^6 - 37920*x^5 - 33320*x^4 - 15732*x^3 - 6176*x^2 - 917*x + 1)*y^7
        - x*(10*x^23 + 20*x^22 + 75*x^21 - 637*x^20 + 1661*x^19 - 4050*x^18 + 1644*x^17 - 1164*x^16 - 9546*x^15 + 4904*x^14 - 9210*x^13 - 1734*x^12 + 5216*x^11 + 5572*x^10 + 18315*x^9 + 9388*x^8 + 14121*x^7 - 6861*x^6 - 10484*x^5 - 17540*x^4 - 14136*x^3 - 8472*x^2 - 3432*x - 792)*y^6
        + x*(5*x^21 + 15*x^20 + 40*x^19 - 681*x^18 + 1270*x^17 - 3175*x^16 + 1148*x^15 - 1103*x^14 - 3581*x^13 + 1833*x^12 - 862*x^11 + 1858*x^10 + 3948*x^9 + 3391*x^8 + 4088*x^7 - 1967*x^6 - 1610*x^5 - 6429*x^4 - 4241*x^3 - 3705*x^2 - 1375*x - 495)*y^5
        - x*(x^19 + 4*x^18 + 10*x^17 - 475*x^16 + 695*x^15 - 1572*x^14 + 512*x^13 - 283*x^12 - 588*x^11 + 622*x^10 + 512*x^9 + 722*x^8 + 633*x^7 - 81*x^6 - 270*x^5 - 1557*x^4 - 945*x^3 - 1200*x^2 - 396*x - 220)*y^4
        - x*(220*x^14 - 264*x^13 + 462*x^12 - 133*x^11 + 2*x^10 + 12*x^9 - 79*x^8 - 78*x^7 - 27*x^6 + 70*x^5 + 213*x^4 + 171*x^3 + 252*x^2 + 82*x + 66)*y^3
        + x*(66*x^12 - 60*x^11 + 75*x^10 - 10*x^9 - 2*x^8 - 2*x^7 + 4*x^6 + 10*x^5 + 16*x^4 + 22*x^3 + 28*x^2 + 12*x + 12)*y^2
        - x*(12*x^10 - 6*x^9 + 5*x^8 + x^7 + x^6 + x^5 + x^4 + x^3 + x^2 + x + 1)*y
        + x^9;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
